name: CalendarDayViewComponent
description: Component representing the day view of the calendar.

inputs.name: allowMultipleSelection
inputs.description:
Whether the user wants to select multiple days or multiple range dates.
If `displayWeekNumbers` is true, the user can click on the week number to mark the related row.
The user can click on week days to mark the related column.
Note: Clickable selection for week row or column does not work for range selections.

inputs.name: calType
inputs.description: The type of calendar, 'single' for single date selection or 'range' for a range of dates.

inputs.name: disableFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable certain dates in the calendar.

inputs.name: disableRangeEndFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable certain dates in the calendar for the range end selection.

inputs.name: disableRangeStartFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable certain dates in the calendar for the range start selection.

inputs.name: focusEscapeFunction
inputs.description: Function that allows to specify which function would be called, when focus wants to escape

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Id of the calendar. If none is provided, one will be generated.

inputs.name: markWeekends
inputs.description: Whether user wants to mark sunday/saturday with `fd-calendar__item--weekend` class

inputs.name: rangeHoverEffect
inputs.description:
Whether user wants to mark day cells on hover.
Works only on range mode, when start date is selected.

inputs.name: showWeekNumbers
inputs.description: Whether user wants to show week numbers next to days

inputs.name: specialDaysRules
inputs.description:
Special days mark, it can be used by passing array of object with
Special day number, list 1-20 [class:`fd-calendar__item--legend-{{number}}`] is available there:
https://sap.github.io/fundamental-styles/components/calendar.html calendar special days section
Rule accepts method with date object as a parameter. ex:
`rule: (date: D) => this.dateAdapter.getDay(date) === 1`, which will mark all sundays as special day.

inputs.name: startingDayOfWeek
inputs.description: The day of the week the calendar should start on. 1 represents Sunday, 2 is Monday, 3 is Tuesday, and so on.

outputs.name: allowMultipleSelectionChange
outputs.description:
Whether the user wants to select multiple days or multiple range dates.
If `displayWeekNumbers` is true, the user can click on the week number to mark the related row.
The user can click on week days to mark the related column.
Note: Clickable selection for week row or column does not work for range selections.

outputs.name: calTypeChange
outputs.description: The type of calendar, 'single' for single date selection or 'range' for a range of dates.

outputs.name: disableFunctionChange
outputs.description: Function used to disable certain dates in the calendar.

outputs.name: disableRangeEndFunctionChange
outputs.description: Function used to disable certain dates in the calendar for the range end selection.

outputs.name: disableRangeStartFunctionChange
outputs.description: Function used to disable certain dates in the calendar for the range start selection.

outputs.name: nextMonthSelect
outputs.description: Event emitted always, when next month is selected, by focus

outputs.name: previousMonthSelect
outputs.description: Event emitted always, when previous month is selected, by focus

outputs.name: rangeHoverEffectChange
outputs.description:
Whether user wants to mark day cells on hover.
Works only on range mode, when start date is selected.

outputs.name: selectedDateChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time selected date in single mode is changed

outputs.name: selectedMultipleDateRangesChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time the first or last date in multiple range mode is changed.

outputs.name: selectedMultipleDatesChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time the selected dates in multiple mode are changed.

outputs.name: selectedRangeDateChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time selected first or last date in range mode is changed

outputs.name: startingDayOfWeekChange
outputs.description: The day of the week the calendar should start on. 1 represents Sunday, 2 is Monday, 3 is Tuesday, and so on.

methods.name: handleWeekSelectionByDays
methods.description:
Toggles the selection of a week on the calendar.
If the provided week is already fully selected, it will deselect it.
If the provided week is not fully selected, it will select the entire week and clear any previous selections.

parameters.name: selectedWeek
parameters.description: Array of CalendarDay objects representing the week to be toggled.

methods.name: handleWeekSelectionByIndex
methods.description:
Toggles the selection of a week on the calendar based on the weekday index.
If the provided week is already fully selected, it will deselect it.
If the provided week is not fully selected, it will select the entire week and clear any previous selections.

parameters.name: weekDayIndex
parameters.description: The index of the weekday to be toggled.

methods.name: setFocusOnCell
methods.description: Set focus on default focusable cell
